title: Command Center Lab integration for emergence system
description: Wire the MAP emergence system into the Command Center Lab UX: document it in lab AGENTS.md, add quick-capture commands to the lab shell and ai wrapper, and add a conditional health check for the emergence CLI.
acceptance_criteria: Lab AGENTS.md documents the emergence quick-capture workflow for lab agents
Lab shell useful-commands block shows ai emerge subcommands
ai emerge <subcommand> routes to map_emergence.py with graceful fallback if not yet deployed
Health check includes conditional emergence CLI check that skips cleanly if map_emergence.py absent
All 23 existing health checks still pass after changes
